title: Kaamannana Makkalu
desc: With the help of his two sons, Kaamanna, a former thief, decides to start a new life on the right side of the law.

title: Auto Shankar
desc: Shankar is an autorickshaw driver belonging to a middle-class family who gets into a conflict with Maya, a money-lender. However, tables turn when she loses her property and they fall in love.

title: Lakshmi Mahalakshmi
desc: Chandrappa believes that his daughter, Lakshmi, brings good luck and his second daughter, Anita, brings bad luck.

title: Aakash
desc: While working odd jobs, Aakash, a practical man, meets Nandini, a rich girl, who falls for him but he does not reciprocate. However, her brothers misunderstand their bond and make his life hell.

title: Mandya
desc: Ganesh, also known as Eshwar, is compelled to move to the city after the bloodshed in his native town devastates him. When he returns years later, he adopts the task of educating people.
